skill.name: bio-atac-seq-nucleosome-positioning
skill.author: GPTomics
skill.description: Extract nucleosome positions from ATAC-seq data using NucleoATAC, ATACseqQC, and fragment analysis. Use when analyzing chromatin organization, identifying nucleosome-free regions at promoters, or characterizing nucleosome occupancy patterns from ATAC-seq fragment size distributions.
